steps.title: Identify the format advantage
steps.content: The student wants an advantage of the "Women and the Vote" format. The relevant note says the play was popular because the interactive format allowed audiences to control the experience.

steps.title: Avoid mere description
steps.content: A only describes the house drawing and artifacts. B explains the click sequence for accessing materials. D identifies the creators and topic of the play. None of these explains why the format appealed to audiences. The answer is C.
